title: T-061 — UI: TEC-093 Nutrition Panel (cross-tagged → 01-NPD)
prompt: Build read-only Nutrition Panel under Item Detail per §10A TEC-093. Audit CC-5: prototype currently mis-tagged here; canonical owner = 01-NPD. Retain as a Tech-side viewer that READS nutrition fields from items.ext_jsonb.nutrition_panel. Match `nutrition_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:608-661. RED tests/ui/tec-093-nutrition.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-093-nutrition.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Read-only nutrition viewer pulling from items.ext_jsonb.nutrition_panel.
pipeline_inputs.details: Per EU 1169/2011 100g format. No edit path here — edit lives in 01-NPD.
acceptance_criteria: Given the panel renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:608-661, then the 100g table layout and field labels match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given items.ext_jsonb.nutrition_panel missing, when rendered, then 'Not declared' state appears.
Given user attempts to click any field, when fired, then fields remain read-only (no edit affordance).
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + read-only behaviour.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow edits — this is a read-only cross-tag view.
